is_statement: Fully managed AWS, Azure and GCP environments with Well-Architected Reviews, security assessments, standardized landing zone modules, and 24/7 operations as certified MSP partner.
does_statement: Eliminates the need for in-house hyperscaler expertise by providing certified 24/7 operations with guaranteed 15-minute incident response across all three major cloud platforms.
means_statement: Saves EUR 2M annually in cloud operations staffing while achieving 99.95% availability SLAs required for energy trading and grid balancing systems.

evidence.statement: T-Systems manages 12,000+ cloud instances for energy sector clients across DACH
